document.title: syamim.
document.description: Due to the presence of non-disclosure agreements (NDAs) on most of my projects, I am unable to share specific details about my work. Therefore, developing a personalized website to showcase my portfolio is the most efficient way to utilize my limited time. This platform will also serve as a personal journal, documenting my photography journey and experiences. Killing two birds with one stone!
document.subtitle: My Journey Showcase

techstack.title: Firebase
techstack.description: Used for storage and real-time database via Firestore, Cloud Storage and Cloud Functions
